mapper.delete: DELETE FROM app_character_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND character_id = #{characterId}
mapper.select: SELECT vote FROM app_character_vote WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND character_id = #{characterId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_character_vote (user_id, character_id, vote, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{characterId}, #{vote}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE vote = VALUES(vote), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM app_character_vote WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND character_id = #{characterId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_character_favorite f JOIN app_character c ON c.id = f.character_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.private_card = 0 AND c.owner_user_id IS NULL AND c.client_visible = 1
